notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: controls/help visual for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate no-text instructional graphic showing drag-to-match orb controls for a fantasy match-3 roguelike.
Subject: close-up fantasy game board with a finger/hand gesture dragging one elemental orb along a short path through adjacent orbs; include subtle arrows, highlight rings, and gesture trail but no words.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D instructional game graphic, clear mobile readability.
Composition/framing: vertical mobile-friendly help visual, board occupies lower two-thirds, gesture path is obvious, safe top area for later UI copy.
Lighting/mood: helpful, clean, approachable.
Color palette: dark stone board, bright elemental orbs, teal/gold guidance highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, avoid confusing multiple gestures.
